html:
Exclusive to:

“Can be placed on dirt ground to change the type of ground.”

-

Rocky Beach Turf is a Turf Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It can be found in the Rocky Beach and Lunar Archipelago Biome on the Lunar Island.

Plants like Berry Bushes, Grass Tufts, Saplings, Spiky Bushes, Lureplants, Pine Cones, and Birchnuts can be planted on these Turfs. It will stop Lureplants' Eyeplants from spawning.

Rocky Beach Turf can be crafted and prototyped with 1 Rocks amd 1 Driftwood Piece at Terra Firma Tamper in the Decorations Filter.

Trivia

  • Rocky Beach Turf was introduced in the Turn of Tides update.

Plants like Berry Bushes, Grass Tufts, Saplings, Spiky Bushes, Lureplants, Pine Cones, and Birchnuts can be planted on these Turfs. It will stop Lureplants' Eyeplants from spawning.
Rocky Beach Turf can be crafted and prototyped with 1 Rocks amd 1 Driftwood Piece at Terra Firma Tamper in the Decorations Filter.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Rocky Beach Turf là ​​một Vật phẩm Turf độc quyền của Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Nó có thể được tìm thấy ở Bãi biển Rocky và Quần xã Quần đảo Mặt Trăng trên Đảo Mặt Trăng.
title: Rocky Beach Turf

'''Rocky Beach Turf''' is a [[Turf]] [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It can be found in the [[Rocky Beach]] and [[Lunar Archipelago]] [[Biomes|Biome]] on the [[Lunar Island]].

Plants like [[Berry Bush]]es, [[Grass Tuft]]s, [[Saplings]], [[Spiky Bush]]es, [[Lureplant]]s, [[Pine Cone]]s, and [[Birchnut]]s can be planted on these Turfs. It will stop Lureplants' [[Eyeplant]]s from spawning.

Rocky Beach Turf can be crafted and prototyped with 1 [[Rocks]] amd 1 [[Driftwood Piece]] at [[Terra Firma Tamper]] in the [[Decorations Filter]].

=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* Rocky Beach Turf was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Turn of Tides|Turn of Tides]]'' update.
